providers.name: GreenGeeks
providers.tagline: Web Hosting That's Good for the Planet
providers.description: GreenGeeks is an eco-friendly web hosting provider that puts back 3x the energy they consume into the grid in the form of renewable energy.

providers.name: Kinsta
providers.tagline: Premium WordPress Hosting on Google Cloud
providers.description: Kinsta provides premium managed WordPress hosting powered by Google Cloud Platform's carbon-neutral infrastructure.

providers.name: HostPapa
providers.tagline: Green Web Hosting for Small Business
providers.description: HostPapa is committed to green web hosting, powering their servers and offices with 100% renewable energy.

providers.name: DreamHost
providers.tagline: Reliable Hosting with a Green Promise
providers.description: DreamHost powers their data centers with renewable energy and offers carbon offsets for their remaining footprint.

providers.name: A2 Hosting
providers.tagline: Turbo Speed with a Green Heart
providers.description: A2 Hosting partners with Carbonfund.org to offset their carbon footprint and provides eco-friendly hosting solutions.

providers.name: Greenhost
providers.description: Greenhost runs all servers on 100% renewable energy from Dutch wind and solar sources.

providers.name: InMotion Hosting
providers.tagline: Green Web Hosting with Carbon Offset
providers.description: InMotion Hosting is committed to sustainability, purchasing renewable energy certificates to offset 100% of their power usage.

providers.name: SiteGround
providers.description: SiteGround runs on Google Cloud's carbon-neutral infrastructure and matches 100% of their energy usage with renewable energy.

providers.name: Hugging Face
providers.description: Hugging Face is committed to sustainable machine learning, offsetting carbon emissions from model training and inference.

providers.name: Plausible Analytics
providers.description: Plausible is a lightweight analytics tool that uses minimal server resources and offsets their carbon footprint.

providers.name: Fathom Analytics
providers.tagline: Simple Analytics Without the Carbon Cost
providers.description: Fathom Analytics runs on renewable-energy-powered servers and uses minimal resources per pageview.

providers.name: Bunny.net
providers.description: Bunny.net operates a global CDN with edge nodes optimized for energy efficiency and powered increasingly by renewable sources.

providers.name: Notion
providers.description: Notion is a carbon-neutral productivity platform, offsetting emissions from cloud infrastructure and operations.

providers.name: Linear
providers.description: Linear offsets their cloud infrastructure carbon emissions and runs on efficient infrastructure.
